international_shipping_policy: Malidag adadzipereka kutumikira makasitomala padziko lonse lapansi ndi zotumiza zodalirika zapadziko lonse lapansi. Timazindikira kufunikira kwa kupezeka komanso kusavuta, ndichifukwa chake tapanga netiweki yazinthu zomwe zimafikira makontinenti onse. Ziribe kanthu komwe muli, timayesetsa kuonetsetsa kuti kugula kwanu kumakhala kothandiza komanso kothandiza. Ntchito zathu zotumizira zapadziko lonse lapansi zimafikira ku Europe, Africa, Asia, America, ndi kupitilira apo. Kudzera mwa othandizana nawo odalirika padziko lonse lapansi, timatha kukupatsirani maoda anu munthawi yake komanso motetezeka. Kutumiza kulikonse kumayendetsedwa mosamala kuti asunge zinthu zabwino ndikuwonetsetsa kukhutitsidwa kwamakasitomala. Ku Malidag, timawona kutumiza kwapadziko lonse lapansi ngati zambiri kuposa ntchito - ndi lonjezo. Lonjezo lopangitsa kuti zinthu zathu zizipezeka kwa anthu osiyanasiyana komanso omwe akukula padziko lonse lapansi. Kaya ndinu ogula koyamba kapena kasitomala wobwerera, mutha kuyembekezera ukatswiri, kudalirika, komanso chisamaliro chokhazikika munjira iliyonse yomwe timakwaniritsa.
shipping_notice: Tikuwonetsa zinthu zomwe zimatumizidwa komwe muli. Mukhoza kusankha malo osiyana mu menyu pamwamba.
learn_about_shipping: Phunzirani za kutumiza padziko lonse lapansi pano
no_kid_fashion_types: Palibe mitundu ya fashoni ya ana
login_to_add_to_basket: Chonde lowani kuti muwonjezere zinthu mudengu lanu.
basket_add_failed: Zalephera kuwonjezera chinthu mudengu. Chonde yesaninso.
basket_add_error: Panali cholakwika powonjezera chinthucho mudengu lanu.
not_connected: 🚫 Simunalumikizidwa. Onetsetsani kuti mwalumikiza netiweki yothandizira.
unknown_network: ❌ Network Yosadziwika. Mwalumikizidwa ku netiweki yosagwirizana.
wallet_not_connected_warning: ⚠️ Chikwama chanu sichinalumikizidwa. Chonde lumikizani chikwama chanu kaye.
shipping_fee: Ku Malidag, tikufuna kupereka ndalama zotumizira zowonekera komanso zampikisano zogwirizana ndi komwe muli komanso mtundu wa oda yanu. Ndalama zotumizira zimawerengeredwa mosinthasintha potuluka, poganizira zinthu monga kopita, njira yotumizira, kulemera kwa chinthu, ndi kukula kwake.  Timagwira ntchito limodzi ndi makampani onyamula katundu ambiri padziko lonse lapansi kuti tipereke mitengo yabwino kwambiri pamitundu yonse yofananira komanso yobweretsera. Panthawi yotuluka, mudzatha kuwona mtengo weniweni wotumizira musanamalize kugula - palibe zolipiritsa zobisika kapena zolipiritsa zosayembekezereka.  Kwa maoda okulirapo kapena omwe akupitilira mtengo wina wake, titha kupereka zotsatsa zaulere za kutumiza, zomwe ziziwonetsedwa potuluka. Zopereka izi zitha kusiyanasiyana malinga ndi dera komanso nthawi yachaka.  Ngati muli ndi mafunso okhudza mtengo wotumizira kapena kuyenerera kutumiza kwaulere, omasuka kulumikizana ndi gulu lathu lothandizira. Tabwera kukuthandizani kuti mupange chisankho chodziwa zambiri komanso chotsika mtengo pazosowa zanu zoperekera.

Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph1: Ku Malidag, timamvetsetsa kuti kubweretsa nthawi yake ndi gawo lofunikira pakugula kwanu. Ichi ndichifukwa chake timagwirira ntchito limodzi ndi onyamula katundu odalirika padziko lonse lapansi kuonetsetsa kuti maoda anu akufikirani mosatekeseka komanso moyenera, mosasamala kanthu komwe muli padziko lapansi.
Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph2: Chiyerekezo cha nthawi yobweretsera chimasiyana kutengera komwe mukupita, njira yotumizira yomwe mwasankha potuluka, ndi njira zilizonse zochotsera katundu. Ngakhale tikuyesetsa kukwaniritsa nthawi yomwe ili pansipa, kuchedwa kwapachaka chifukwa cha ma positi am'deralo kapena malamulo apadziko lonse lapansi angachitike.
standard: Kutumiza Kwanthawi Zonse: Nthawi zambiri zimaperekedwa mkati mwa 7 mpaka masiku a bizinesi a 21 , kutengera malo ndi ntchito za positi.
express: Kutumiza kwa Express: Imafika mkati mwa masiku 3 mpaka 7 ogwira ntchito m'malo ambiri opita kumayiko ena kudzera pama premium onyamula.
Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph3: Mudzalandira nambala yolondolera mukangotumiza oda yanu, kuti mutha kuyang'anira ulendo wake munthawi yeniyeni. Ngati phukusi lanu lichedwa kupitirira zenera lomwe likuyembekezeredwa, gulu lathu lothandizira limakhalapo nthawi zonse kuti likuthandizeni kuthetsa vutoli mwachangu.
Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph4: Chonde dziwani kuti tchuthi cha anthu onse, zoyendera za kasitomu, kapena malo otumizira akutali atha kuwonjezera nthawi. Tikupangira kusankha kutumiza mwachangu pamaoda otengera nthawi.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph1: Ku Malidag, tikufuna kupereka ndalama zotumizira zowonekera komanso zampikisano zogwirizana ndi komwe muli komanso mtundu wa oda yanu. Ndalama zotumizira zimawerengeredwa mosinthika potuluka, poganizira zinthu monga kopita, njira yotumizira, kulemera kwa chinthu, ndi kukula kwake.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph2: Timagwira ntchito limodzi ndi makampani onyamula katundu ambiri padziko lonse lapansi kuti tipereke mitengo yabwino kwambiri pamitundu yonse yofananira komanso yobweretsera. Potuluka, mudzatha kuwona mtengo weniweni wotumizira musanamalize kugula - palibe zolipiritsa zobisika kapena zolipiritsa zosayembekezereka.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph3: Kwa maoda akuluakulu kapena omwe akupitilira mtengo wina wake, titha kupereka zotsatsa zaulere za kutumiza kwaulere , zomwe ziziwonetsedwa bwino potuluka. Zopereka izi zitha kusiyanasiyana malinga ndi dera komanso nthawi yachaka.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph4: Ngati muli ndi mafunso okhudza mtengo wotumizira kapena kuyenerera kutumiza kwaulere, omasuka kulumikizana ndi gulu lathu lothandizira. Tabwera kukuthandizani kuti mupange chisankho chodziwa zambiri komanso chotsika mtengo pazosowa zanu zoperekera.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph1: Chonde dziwani kuti maoda onse apadziko lonse lapansi atha kutsatiridwa ndi msonkho wakunja, misonkho yochokera kunja, ndi zolipiritsa zina zoperekedwa ndi boma lanu. Ndalamazi sizikuphatikizidwa pamitengo kapena zotumizira zomwe zikuwonetsedwa pa Malidag ndipo zitha kusonkhanitsidwa ndi oyang'anira akadaulo akumaloko mukabweretsa.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph2: Monga wolandira, ndinu nokha amene muli ndi udindo woonetsetsa kuti dziko lanu likutsatira malamulo oyendetsera dziko lanu komanso kulipira chindapusa chilichonse. Tikukulimbikitsani kuti mufufuze ndi ofesi ya kasitomu ya dziko lanu kuti mudziwe zambiri musanayike oda yanu.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph3: Malidag alibe mlandu wowonjezera zina, kuchedwa kwa kasitomu, kapena kukana phukusi chifukwa cha msonkho wosalipidwa kapena nkhani zokhudzana ndi msonkho. Kukachitika kuti phukusi libwezeredwa chifukwa chakusalipira kapena kusagwirizana, zotumizira zilizonse zobweza kapena zolipiritsa zidzachotsedwa pakubweza kwanu.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph4: Timayesetsa kuti malonda anu apadziko lonse akhale osavuta momwe tingathere ndipo tili pano kuti tikuthandizeni ndi mafunso aliwonse okhudzana ndi miyambo kapena zolemba. Chonde musazengereze kulumikizana ndi gulu lathu lothandizira musanagule kapena mutagula.
